name: Service Outage Exceeding SLA
description: A service outage has exceeded the contractual SLA thresholds. Simulate the consequences including service credits, termination rights, and liability exposure.

parameters.name: affected_services
parameters.description: Which services or systems were affected

parameters.name: sla_threshold_hours
parameters.description: The SLA uptime threshold that was breached (in max downtime hours per month)

analysis_guidance: Focus on: (1) SLA definitions — what are the contractual uptime commitments? How is downtime measured? (2) Service credits — what credits or refunds are owed? Is there a cap on credits? (3) Escalation procedures — were required notification and escalation steps followed? (4) Termination rights — does chronic or severe SLA failure trigger termination rights? (5) Limitation of liability — how do liability caps interact with SLA failures? Are consequential damages excluded? (6) Force majeure — could the outage qualify as force majeure? (7) Root cause obligations — is there a contractual duty to provide root cause analysis? (8) Remediation plan — what corrective action commitments exist?
